repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: Each selected memory directly addresses a build failure caused by duplicate REG_OP macro leading to redefinition of the operator class in autogen/op_proto.h, which is the exact error seen for ca6k_04541 (redefinition of 'class ge::op::Ca6k04541Custom'). These memories document solutions such as avoiding manual OP_ADD when autogen REG_OP already exists, not duplicating REG_OP, or keeping only one registration. Applying the analogous fix for ca6k_04541 should resolve the redefinition error.
